  "findings": [
    "Neutrals and equipment grounding conductors are mixed/bonded together in a subpanel, violating the required separation of grounded and grounding conductors."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Isolate the neutral bar from the panelboard enclosure by removing the main bonding jumper.",
    "Separate all equipment grounding conductors to a dedicated, bonded ground bar.",
    "Ensure all neutral conductors are terminated only on the insulated neutral bar."
  ],
  "rationale": "In a subpanel (downstream of the service disconnecting means), the neutral (grounded) conductor must be isolated from the equipment grounding conductors and the panel enclosure to prevent objectionable neutral current from flowing on metal raceways, enclosures, and grounding paths, which poses a severe shock and fire hazard.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Art. 408",
    "NEC 250.24(A)(5)",
    "NEC 250.142(B)",
    "NEC 200.4"
  ]
}
